message:
refactor(vdbe): clean up storage cursor test helpers and remove dead code

Remove ~69 lines of obsolete dual-mode cursor test scaffolding that was
superseded by the Phase 5C.1 read/write cursor split. Simplify remaining
storage cursor test setup to match the new single-path architecture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
